name: Deborah Fletcher
body: Hi, I’m friends with Courtney and Suzanne. They asked me to pray for you. I don’t have any details other than what I just read, which sounds scary. But God is bigger than our fears. Your song “Trust” is beautiful and what it’s all about. Prayers for successful surgery and healing.

name: Patti Younker
body: Lyla, I know your Aunt Cathy. I’m praying for you to have comfort & healing. You are Strong, Smart, & Brave. Oh, and you are So Pretty. Love & prayers to you. Patti Younker

name: Chuck N Lori W
body: Dear Kayla, you and your family are in our prayers especially today. 🙏

name: Holly Williams
body: Lee and Kayla, we are late learning of this journey, but we join in lifting you all up in prayer to the God of Angel Armies. We love you.

name: Ellen Yoakam
body: Lyla is pure joy and light! Praying for you all continuously.

name: Ashley Phillips
body: Praying for peace as you battle the what ifs and love each other in the waiting. ❤️

name: Suzanne Hale
body: Prayers going up for you Lyla and the rest of the family and for all the doctors, nurses, and anyone else that is caring for you. I know God is with you and your family and He hears each and every pray on your behalf. Love you, Suzanne

name: Kathy Laub
body: Just read this:Romans 15:13 Now may the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing, so that you will abound in hope by the power of the Holy Spirit.

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: Continuing to ask God to be your “portion” for all that each of the four of you need for THIS day, as you prepare for tomorrow.

name: Max Dotson
body: Prayers continually for you all! So many people love you all and are here whenever help is needed, or just someone to talk to.

name: Kathy Laub
body: Wow. Just wow. Sharing Lyla's poem with our family prayer chain. Completely understanding your fears. Praying for the peace that passes all understanding. Remembering He who is greater than he who is in the world. ❤️❤️❤️🙏🙏🙏
